summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Taplo landing page Live Demo section and verified existing dashboard functionality. All new demo features working correctly with no issues found.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, Problem, How it Works, Live Demo, Features, CTA, Footer)
Live Demo section displays 'See Taplo in action' heading correctly
Demo dashboard shows 6 candidate cards with proper data and layout
All 5 demo tabs work correctly (All, Silver Medallist, Not Ready Yet, Pipeline, Offer Declined)
Tab filtering functions properly (Silver Medallist shows 2 cards, All shows 6)
Follow Up buttons on demo candidates open follow-up view
Demo follow-up view displays candidate details correctly
Generate AI Message button triggers typing animation
Subject and body typing animation works as expected
Copy and Open Email Client buttons appear after message generation
Back to pipeline button returns to candidate grid view
Admin login works with provided credentials
Dashboard loads with proper navigation and layout
